message:
refactor(compiler): Use Zig -M module flags for clean compilation

Replace fragile file mirroring and import patching with Zig's native
module system. Now modules are defined at compile time via -M flags
with proper --dep declarations in reverse dependency order.

- Add MODULES array with full dependency graph
- buildModuleFlags() generates flags in correct order (deps before -M)
- C source files placed before module definitions
- Delete compiler_utils.zig (500+ lines of patching code)
- Test runner now uses compiler.compileZigWithOptions()
